title: schedonorus tenellus
intro: Schedonorus tenellus, also known as timothy grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Schedonorus tenellus include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Schedonorus tenellus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of allergies, coughs, and colds.
